# hindclaw_group_membership (Resource)

Manages membership of a user in a Hindclaw group.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "hindclaw_group_membership" "alice_agents" {
  group_id = "agents"
  user_id  = "alice"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `group_id` (String) Group identifier.
- `user_id` (String) User identifier.
